title: Add integration test for None-episodes edge through search path
analysis: EdgeWithNoneEpisodes (conftest.py:58) simulates a Graphiti edge where episodes=None (attribute present but set to None). It has a unit test in TestBuildEdgeDict (line 961: test_none_episodes_attr_produces_empty_provenance) that calls _build_edge_dict directly. However, it lacks an integration test through the search() path. Its counterpart EdgeWithoutUuid has both a unit test (test_edge_with_no_uuid_attr_returns_none at line 870) and an integration test (test_none_uuid_edge_falls_back_to_index_in_search at line 478). The new test should mirror the pattern at line 478: mock graphiti.search to return [EdgeWithNoneEpisodes()], mock mem0.search to return empty, call service.search(), and assert results[0].provenance == []. The test goes at the end of TestSearch (after line 499, before the blank line at 501). Since EdgeWithNoneEpisodes has uuid='u-ep-none', the id assertion should check for that uuid (unlike EdgeWithoutUuid which falls back to index '0'). No implementation changes needed — _build_edge_dict already handles episodes=None correctly as proven by the unit test. The conftest fixture was already consolidated from inline to conftest.py by task 149.

steps.description: Add async integration test test_none_episodes_edge_produces_empty_provenance_in_search to TestSearch class in test_memory_service.py, inserted after test_none_uuid_edge_falls_back_to_index_in_search (after line 499, before the blank line at 501). The test: (1) imports EdgeWithNoneEpisodes from tests.conftest, (2) mocks service.graphiti.search = AsyncMock(return_value=[EdgeWithNoneEpisodes()]), (3) mocks service.mem0.search = AsyncMock(return_value={'results': []}), (4) calls results = await service.search(query='test', project_id='test'), (5) asserts len(results) == 1, (6) asserts results[0].id == 'u-ep-none' with descriptive f-string message, (7) asserts results[0].provenance == [] with descriptive f-string message. Docstring: 'An edge with episodes=None (attribute present but None) produces empty provenance in search results. Covers the full search() → _search_graphiti → _build_edge_dict pipeline with None episodes, complementing the unit test test_none_episodes_attr_produces_empty_provenance which only tests the helper in isolation.'

Run the new test to verify it passes (no implementation change expected — _build_edge_dict already handles episodes=None). Run: pytest fused-memory/tests/test_memory_service.py::TestSearch::test_none_episodes_edge_produces_empty_provenance_in_search -v. If it fails, investigate the search path for a bug in provenance propagation and fix it.

design_decisions.decision: Place test at end of TestSearch class, immediately after test_none_uuid_edge_falls_back_to_index_in_search
design_decisions.rationale: Groups related edge-case search tests together. The None-episodes test is a natural companion to the None-uuid test, both covering edge attribute edge cases through the full search path.
Unlike EdgeWithoutUuid which lacks a uuid attribute entirely and falls back to str(index), EdgeWithNoneEpisodes has uuid='u-ep-none'. The search path should use this uuid as the result id.

design_decisions.decision: No implementation changes expected — test-only task
design_decisions.rationale: The unit test already proves _build_edge_dict handles episodes=None. The integration test is purely for coverage of the full search() → _search_graphiti → _build_edge_dict pipeline with this edge case. Step 2 is a verification-only step.

reuse.how: Import from tests.conftest and instantiate with defaults — same pattern used by the unit test at line 967
Mirror the exact test structure: mock graphiti.search with the edge fixture, mock mem0.search with empty results, call service.search(), assert on result fields with descriptive f-string messages
Use the existing service fixture — it already mocks graphiti and mem0 with AsyncMock. Override graphiti.search and mem0.search in the test body (same pattern as line 489-490)
